file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  InputBox,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import React, { FC } from 'react';
import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import { formatCurrencyBR, getFormattedPoints } from '../../utils/functions';
import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';

const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  handleContinue,
  points,
  formattedPrice,
  handleChangeReais,
  handleChangePoints,
  handleUseAll,
  pointsValue,
  reaisValue,
  convertionValue,
  pointsError,
  reaisError,
  items,
  pointsQuantity,
  handleModalizeContinue,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  handleSelectEvent,
  height,
  width,
  isLoadingParameterization,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title="Cashback na fatura"
      hasRightIcon
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
        <Text
          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
          type="headingMDL"
          mt="smaller"
        >
          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
        </Text>

        <Box direction mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
            Pontos disponíveis:
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em pontos"
          placeholder="0"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="number-pad"
          value={pointsValue}
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
          error={pointsError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
          textRight="Usar todos"
          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
        />

        <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
          <Icon
            name="icon-switch-vertical"
            size="xxs"
            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
            mr="nano"
            ml="nano"
          />
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em reais"
          placeholder="R$0,00"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
          value={reaisValue}
          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
          error={reaisError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
        />
        {isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
          </Box>
        )}
        {!isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Text type="paragraphMD">
              Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem {convertionValue || formatCurrencyBR(0)} de
              cashback na fatura.
            </Text>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
        <Button
          disabled={
            pointsValue === '' ||
            reaisValue === '' ||
            pointsValue === '0' ||
            reaisValue === '0' ||
            pointsError ||
            reaisError
          }
          text="Continuar"
          mt="large"
          mb="small"
          onPress={handleContinue}
          testID="invoice-cashback-button"
        />
      </Box>
      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;

content.content:
1→import { Box, Image } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     2→import { Text } from '@semparar/design-system-app/fintech';
     3→import React from 'react';
     4→import { Animated } from 'react-native';
     5→import arrow from '../../../assets/images/arrow.png';
     6→import { AnimationArrowsViewProps } from './Models';
     7→import { Container } from './styles';
     8→
     9→const AnimationArrowsView = ({
    10→  arrow1Move,
    11→  arrow1Fade,
    12→  arrow2Move,
    13→  arrow2Fade,
    14→  arrow3Move,
    15→  arrow3Fade,
    16→}: AnimationArrowsViewProps) => {
    17→  return (
    18→    <Container testID="AnimationArrowsView">
    19→      <Box
    20→        justify="center"
    21→        align="center"
    22→        width="100%"
    23→        overflow="hidden"
    24→        height={175}
    25→      >
    26→        <Box direction justify="center">
    27→          <Animated.View
    28→            style={[
    29→              {
    30→                position: 'absolute',
    31→                transform: [{ translateX: -35 }, { translateY: arrow1Move }],
    32→                opacity: arrow1Fade,
    33→              },
    34→            ]}
    35→          >
    36→            <Image height={41} width={30} source={arrow} />
    37→          </Animated.View>
    38→          <Animated.View
    39→            style={[
    40→              {
    41→                position: 'absolute',
    42→                transform: [{ translateY: arrow2Move }],
    43→                opacity: arrow2Fade,
    44→              },
    45→            ]}
    46→          >
    47→            <Image height={41} width={30} source={arrow} />
    48→          </Animated.View>
    49→          <Animated.View
    50→            style={[
    51→              {
    52→                position: 'absolute',
    53→                transform: [{ translateX: 30 }, { translateY: arrow3Move }],
    54→                opacity: arrow3Fade,
    55→              },
    56→            ]}
    57→          >
    58→            <Image height={41} width={30} source={arrow} />
    59→          </Animated.View>
    60→        </Box>
    61→      </Box>
    62→      <Text align="center" mt="middle" type="subtitleLarger">
    63→        Estamos carregando suas informações...
    64→      </Text>
    65→    </Container>
    66→  );
    67→};
    68→
    69→export default AnimationArrowsView;
    70→

{

    "bump-minor": "npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && bundle exec fastlane bump",
    "bump-major": "npm version major --no-git-tag-version && bundle exec fastlane bump",
    "sync:yalc": "nodemon --watch src --ext js,ts,tsx,json --exec \"yalc publish --push\"",
    "sync-typings": "ts-node scripts/sync-typings.ts",
    "knip": "knip",
    "knip:fix": "knip --fix --allow-remove-files",
    "lint": "run-s lint:*",

content.text: Perfect! Now I have all the data I need. Let me verify the pattern one more time by checking if there are any inconsistencies:

input.description: Find Box elements with direction prop that has a value assignment (not boolean)

content.text:
Based on my comprehensive search of the codebase, I can now provide a validated answer:

---

**CONFIRMED: `<Box direction>` is the correct usage pattern.**

## Evidence:

**All 8 usages in the codebase follow the boolean pattern (no string values):**

1. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/atomic/templates/BasicScreen/view.tsx:83` - `<Box direction justify="space-between">`
2. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/atomic/templates/BasicScreen/view.tsx:89` - `<Box direction justify="space-between">`
3. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx:62` - `<Box direction mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">`
4. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx:86` - `<Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">`
5. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx:110` - `<Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">`
6. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx:115` - `<Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">`
7. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/atomic/atoms/AnimationArrows/view.tsx:26` - `<Box direction justify="center">`
8. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet/index.tsx:167` - `<Box direction width={screenWidth} ml="small">`

**Key findings:**
- **Zero instances** of `direction="row"` or `direction="column"` exist in the codebase
- **100% consistency**: All 8 usages employ `direction` as a boolean prop (shorthand)
- The pattern indicates `direction` defaults to row flex direction when present as a boolean
- This aligns with React Native's FlexBox defaults and modern design system conventions

**Conclusion:** The change from `<Box direction="row">` to `<Box direction>` is **correct and follows the established pattern** in the @semparar/design-system-app.
